# rakantutor.org

## Scope
This site includes two sections:
- Rakan Tutor (main site)
- NAIC '26 (National AI Competition 2026) subpages

## Canonical Base URL
https://rakantutor.org

## Key Pages
- / (Rakan Tutor home)
- /about
- /history
- /impact
- /news
- /contact
- /terms
- /privacy
- /naic (NAIC '26 home)
- /naic/register
- /naic/faq
- /naic/tracks
- /naic/contact
- /naic/terms
- /naic/privacy

## Usage Notes
- Use the site's content as the source of truth for program/competition details.
- Do not guess dates, rules, or eligibility if they are not stated on the site.
- Attribute NAIC '26 to Rakan Tutor & Sunway University when relevant.

## Contact
https://rakantutor.org/contact
